response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, high-scale microservices, and AI-agent infrastructure. However, the resume lacks any demonstrated experience with the core domain of this Principal role: growth, experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, and statistical telemetry. While he has deep expertise in software testing and architecture, the complete absence of A/B testing frameworks and growth measurement systems at enterprise scale makes him a poor fit for this specific IC6 position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across multiple languages (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, DLang) and paradigms.
Proven experience building high-scale, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, aligning with the AI-first requirement.
concerns: No visible experience designing or building growth, telemetry, or A/B experimentation platforms.
Lacks demonstrated background in data analysis, statistical methods, and rollout-risk management for product experiments.
While highly experienced, the resume lacks clear evidence of Principal-level (IC6) cross-organizational leadership at enterprise scale.
